title: EB and CC have updates - Update button, Release notes and Poly Lens links are available
scenario: Firmware update flow for both earbuds and charge case shows correct Update buttons, tags, and links on Device Settings Software Update tab
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
2. Ensure both the earbuds and the charge case have firmware updates available.
3. Observe the Home screen — verify that an 'Update' button is displayed.
5. Verify that the app navigates to Device Settings with the Software Update tab expanded.
6. On the Device Settings screen, observe the earbuds section — verify an 'Update' button with a '1' tag is shown on the settings tab.
7. On the Device Settings screen, observe the charge case section — verify 'Update Available' is displayed with info about needing Poly Lens Desktop.
8. Tap the release notes link for the earbuds — verify it is functional and opens the correct content.
9. Tap the Poly Lens App link for the charge case — verify it is functional and opens the correct content.
expected: Home screen shows an 'Update' button. Tapping it navigates to Device Settings with the Software Update tab expanded. Earbuds show an 'Update' button with a '1' tag. Charge case shows 'Update Available' with info about needing Poly Lens Desktop. Both the release notes link (earbuds) and Poly Lens App link (charge case) are present and functional.
